lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: What'you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you-

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: What? Speak up, I can't hear you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm... I'm just looking for some pickaxes! Do you have any?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Do I have any pickaxes? Do I? Of course I do, this is a pickaxe shop, isn't it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you-

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: What? Stop mumbling!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want a quest!

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: I don't have any lousy quests... I've got someone who's helping me already!

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Well, I say helping... he takes his merry time to do his chores, my son does.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then perhaps I can help in some way?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Pfft, I doubt it... maybe when my son fouls up again, but not now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Then clear off!

sections.title: Getting a metal bar or ore item request

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: My no good son must be down the pub again, drinking away all our money instead of getting one simple item from the market for me.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Now, I have another errand. Perhaps you will be more useful?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it about?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: I'm in need of some raw supplies. Get me [2-3] [item] and be quick about it! I need them within the next [X] minutes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, [2-3] [item] in [X] minutes, that sounds about alright.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't work for rude people.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: You're just as bad as my son, or worse!

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Where're my [X] [item]? My son could've gotten them faster!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've had enough of this wild goose chase.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Why you useless little human! I should thrown you in the Kelda! With a lump of granite attached to your feet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ha, who are you calling little here?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Get out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still trying to collect them.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Try a little harder! I don't have all day you know!

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: My no good son must be down the pub again, drinking away all our money instead of getting one simple item from the market for me.

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Now, I have another errand. Perhaps you will be more useful?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it about?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: I need a couple of iron pickaxes, I'm always short on the darned things. But hurry up! I will need them before [15/20/25] minutes are up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, [3/4/5] iron pickaxes in [15/20/25] minutes, that sounds about alright.

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: You're as bad as my soon! Clear off before I beat you with this stick!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've collected all [X] [item] for you!

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Give 'em to me quick before I change my mind about rewarding you!

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you for these or can I get away with teaching you how to mine properly?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Tati
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.
